description: Mert Mumtaz, CEO of Helios, discusses the advantages of building on the Solana blockchain, emphasizing its speed, scalability, and community support. He highlights Helios as a platform designed to help developers create applications more efficiently.
topic_summary: In this interview, Mert Mumtaz explains how Helios supports Solana developers in creating applications, underscoring Solana's technological strengths and vibrant community [t=0:16-0:28].
